---
title: "Prerequisites"
pagetitle: "Prerequisites"
---

## Software

- R (>= 4.3)
- RStudio or VS Code
- Quarto CLI
- Git

## R packages

Install the following packages before the workshop:

```r
install.packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "sf",
  "tmap",
  "osmdata",
  "stats19",
  "stplanr",
  "dodgr"
))
```

## Data

We will use open datasets throughout the workshop. All data will be downloadable during the sessions.

## GitHub Account

Please create a GitHub account if you do not already have one.
